icp: Job titles: Owners, Founders, C-Level. Industries: B2B Services Companies. Company size: 2–50 employees. Geography: United States.
offerDescription:
AI Sales Agent that replaces a junior sales rep -- handles inbound and outbound, knows your product inside and out from day one, ~$3K/month vs $60K-$100K/year for a human rep.

Unique angle: Not just an SDR tool -- it's a full sales agent that understands your product (pricing, integrations, specs) with no ramp time. Execution capacity that compounds monthly at 1/20th the cost. Built by operators (Chris Lee, Nick Dinsmoor, Paul Fung) who scaled and exited their own B2B services company.

Talking points: Replaces junior sales rep from day one. Handles inbound and outbound. Knows product inside and out with no ramp time. ~$3K/month vs $60K-$100K/year. Execution capacity that compounds monthly. Built by operators who scaled and exited a B2B services company.

Primary CTA: Can I send you a demo?

Avoid: Sounding over-personalized.
followUpGuidance:
Sent 3 days after connecting. Short, casual, pain-first. One ask at the end.

What NOT to do: Don't over-explain. Don't list every feature. Don't sound over-personalized.
inMailGuidance: Open Profiles only (free). Subject under 8 words. Include natural sign-off.

connectionRequest.a: [First Name] -- built an AI agent that handles sales calls like a junior rep for $3K/month. Thought it might be relevant for [Company Name].
connectionRequest.b: [First Name] -- we replaced junior sales reps with AI agents that know your product inside-out. $3K/month vs $60K-$100K/year. Worth a look?

followUp.a:
Hey [First Name],

Quick question -- are you hiring sales reps right now or thinking about it?

We built an AI sales agent that replaces a junior rep from day one. Handles inbound and outbound, knows your pricing/integrations/specs without any training, and costs ~$3K/month instead of $60K-$100K/year.

The difference: this isn't an SDR tool. It's a full sales agent with execution capacity that compounds monthly.

Built it with my co-founders after scaling and exiting our own B2B services company.

Can I send you a demo?

-- Chris
followUp.b:
Hey [First Name],

You know that 3-6 month ramp time for new sales reps? And the $60K-$100K salary before they're even productive?

We killed both problems.

Built an AI sales agent that handles inbound and outbound, knows your product inside and out from day one, and costs ~$3K/month.

Not a chatbot or SDR tool -- it's a full sales agent with execution capacity that compounds monthly.

Can I send you a demo?

-- Chris

inMail.subject: Replace junior reps with AI agents?
inMail.body:
Hey [First Name],

Most AI sales tools just book meetings. We built an actual sales agent.

Handles inbound and outbound calls, knows your product inside-out from day one (pricing, specs, integrations), and costs ~$3K/month vs $60K-$100K for a junior rep.

No ramp time. No training. Just execution capacity that compounds monthly.

My co-founders and I scaled and exited our own B2B services company -- we built this because we needed it.

Can I send you a demo?

-- Chris
